title: Average time to first purchase
prompt: For users who signed up and later purchased, compute the minutes from their signup to their first purchase (only counting purchases after signup). Return the average across those users, rounded to 1 decimal, as a single column avg_minutes.

generic: SELECT ROUND(AVG(date_diff('minute', s.signup_at, p.first_purchase_at)), 1) AS avg_minutes
JOIN purchases p ON p.user_id = s.user_id

hints: Get each user’s first signup and first purchase in two CTEs, then join on user_id.
Keep only users whose first purchase is after signup; AVG the minute gap.
